globalOptions.name: --dry-run
globalOptions.description: Preview what would happen without making changes

subcommands.name: next dev
subcommands.description: Starts the Next.js development server with Hot Module Replacement and Fast Refresh.

options.name: --turbo
options.description: Enable Turbopack for faster development builds

options.name: --experimental-https
options.description: Start the server with HTTPS and generate a self-signed certificate

subcommands.name: next build
subcommands.description: Creates an optimized production build of the Next.js application.

options.name: --experimental-build-mode
options.description: Set build mode: compile or generate

subcommands.name: next start
subcommands.description: Starts the Next.js production server. Requires next build to be run first.

options.name: --keepAliveTimeout
options.description: Max milliseconds to wait before closing inactive connections

subcommands.name: next lint
subcommands.description: Runs ESLint for all files in the pages/, app/, components/, lib/, and src/ directories.

options.name: --max-warnings
options.description: Max number of warnings before non-zero exit

subcommands.name: next info
subcommands.description: Prints relevant system information for reporting Next.js bugs.

subcommands.name: next experimental-compile
subcommands.description: Runs the compilation step of next build without generating static pages.

subcommands.name: next experimental-generate
subcommands.description: Runs the static generation step of next build after experimental-compile.

subcommands.name: npx create-next-app@latest
subcommands.description: Scaffolds a new Next.js application with interactive setup.

options.name: --use-npm
options.description: Use npm as the package manager

options.name: --use-yarn
options.description: Use Yarn as the package manager

options.name: --use-pnpm
options.description: Use pnpm as the package manager

options.name: --use-bun
options.description: Use Bun as the package manager

subcommands.name: NEXT_PUBLIC_*
subcommands.description: Environment variables prefixed with NEXT_PUBLIC_ are exposed to the browser bundle.

subcommands.name: NODE_ENV
subcommands.description: Set to 'development', 'production', or 'test' to control Next.js behavior.

subcommands.name: NEXT_RUNTIME
subcommands.description: Set to 'nodejs' or 'edge' to specify the runtime for Route Handlers and Server Components.

subcommands.name: ANALYZE
subcommands.description: Enable bundle analysis with @next/bundle-analyzer when set to 'true'.

subcommands.name: PORT
subcommands.description: Set the port for the Next.js server (alternative to --port flag).

subcommands.name: HOSTNAME
subcommands.description: Set the hostname for the Next.js server (alternative to --hostname flag).
